message:
Add circuit breaker types and configuration

Implements the core circuit breaker state machine and configuration
infrastructure needed for resilient worker selection and health
monitoring. This provides the foundation for the circuit breaker
pattern (bead remote_compilation_helper-62v).

Circuit State Machine:
- CircuitState enum: Closed (normal) -> Open (blocked) -> HalfOpen (probing)
- Default state is Closed, representing normal operation
- State transitions are deterministic and well-defined

Configuration Model (CircuitBreakerConfig):
- failure_threshold (3): Consecutive failures to open circuit
- success_threshold (2): Consecutive successes to close circuit
- error_rate_threshold (0.5): Error rate threshold for opening
- window_secs (60): Rolling window for error rate calculation
- open_cooldown_secs (30): Duration before attempting half-open
- half_open_max_probes (1): Max concurrent probes in half-open state

All defaults are sensible for remote compilation scenarios where
we want to fail-fast on problematic workers but recover quickly.

Includes:
- Serde serialization with snake_case field names
- Default implementations for both types
- Export from rch-common library
- Comprehensive unit tests for defaults and serialization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
